title: Lonicera solonis
taxonomy: Lonicera solonis is a species of honeysuckle, belonging to the family Caprifoliaceae. This family includes other flowering plants such as honeysuckle, weigela, and fuchsia. Lonicera solonis is further classified as a member of the genus Lonicera, which consists of around 200 species of honeysuckle. The order of Lonicera solonis is Dipsacales, a group of flowering plants that also includes the families Adoxaceae and Valerianaceae. The kingdom to which Lonicera solonis belongs is Plantae, the kingdom of plants.
uses: Lonicera solonis is not a known common name for the Lonicera plant, however, I have found information on the medicinal uses of the Lonicera plant as a whole.
